## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss approach and timeline for creating a vision-setting video showcasing Deep Gram's voice AI capabilities in light of recent OpenAI and Google announcements.](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [OpenAI's multimodal AI demo raised expectations, but Deep Gram can still showcase unique value for enterprise use cases](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Video should focus on practical applications and being the fastest path to production, not making grandiose claims](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Ground the narrative in humanity - how voice interfaces give us more time for meaningful experiences](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

## Topics

### Positioning Against OpenAI/Google

  - [Acknowledge their progress positively - it's advancing the market we want to enable](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Don't try to directly compete on consumer use cases they demoed](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Highlight Deep Gram's strengths: cost, speed, enterprise-readiness, customizability](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)

### Target Audience

  - [CTOs/technical decision makers evaluating voice AI for production use cases](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Prospective customers and investors, but avoid pure brand-building exercise](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Narrative Approach

  - [Use storytelling framework: change in world, winners/losers, obstacles, promised land](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=2348.0)
  - [Ground narrative in humanity - how voice interfaces enhance rather than replace human experience](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=2969.0)
  - [Showcase practical use cases where voice AI solves real needs (e.g. understaffed call centers, healthcare, accessibility)](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=3350.0)
  - [Inspire builders to create solutions, not just entertain](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=3451.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Josh and Marcel to draft initial script leveraging the storytelling framework](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=2747.0)
  - [Confirm videographer availability for shoot in early June](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Align on level of demo functionality to showcase](https://fathom.video/share/PEY6zHnnKGEcqLDFA-XrLWr8FzX9kLug?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
